candidate_sources.source: patient cashbox debt account balance on patient card
evidence: patient 625: report debt 17800.00; patient cashbox shows 'Долговой счёт пациента Баланс: -17 800.00 ₽'
patient 710: report debt 7750.00; patient cashbox shows 'Долговой счёт пациента Баланс: -7 750.00 ₽'
patient 2230: report debt 0.00 and advance 200.00; patient cashbox shows 'Персональный счёт пациента Баланс: 200.00 ₽' and no debt balance
candidate_sources.interpretation_rule: RPT_3 column 'Долг' renders the absolute value of the negative debt-account balance

evidence: RPT_45 first-row finance linkage already ties the same debt/advance row shape to patient cashbox balances and bills ledger for patient 625
candidate_sources.interpretation_rule: RPT_3 and RPT_45 share the same debts-and-advances business family, but RPT_3 is not promoted to full family equivalence from this alone

evidence: API settings describe i/balance as 'Импортирует суммы долгов и авансов'
test form parameters are externalClientId, amountTypeInt, sum, debt, branchId
live call with native patient id 625 returned status=false and error='Клиент не найден.'
candidate_sources.interpretation_rule: Do not treat i/balance as a direct read API for RPT_3 rows

evidence: Useful for patient name and phone identity on sampled rows
Does not explain debt/advance/available row values
candidate_sources.interpretation_rule: Identity source only, not finance source

evidence: Earlier RPT_45 linkage proved that invoice detail can confirm last operation timestamps after invoice ids are resolved from patient cashbox ledger
It does not act as a single direct source for the aggregate debt number
candidate_sources.interpretation_rule: Supporting evidence only after ledger-to-invoice resolution

cashbox_card_evidence.observed_text: Персональный счёт пациента Баланс: 0.00 ₽; Долговой счёт пациента Баланс: -17 800.00 ₽
Персональный счёт пациента Баланс: 0.00 ₽; Долговой счёт пациента Баланс: -7 750.00 ₽
Персональный счёт пациента Баланс: 200.00 ₽; Долговой счёт пациента Счет еще не открыт

final_verdict.proven: On sampled patients, RPT_3 column 'Долг' is explained by the patient cashbox debt-account balance rendered on patient cashbox tabs.
final_verdict.partial: The exact backend assembly path for the whole report remains hidden/server-side.
final_verdict.not_proven: No published API read method is proven as the direct source of 'Долг' for RPT_3; i/balance must not be promoted to that role.
